title: HORSE RACING LICENSE FEES
doc_html:
CHAPTER 2.  HORSE RACING LICENSE FEES

§2501.  Imposition of license fees

Every person conducting horse race meetings shall pay the license fees imposed under Title 4, which shall be collected in the manner therein provided.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 2.  HORSE RACING LICENSE FEES
§2501.  Imposition of license fees
Every person conducting horse race meetings shall pay the license fees imposed under Title 4, which shall be collected in the manner therein provided.
